stories.headline: Iran war live: Sirens in Bahrain, Kuwait as Tehran responds to US attacks

stories.headline: US launches strikes on Iran after tankers hit in Strait of Hormuz
stories.summary: The US says the strikes are intended to impose "heavy costs", while Iran warns it will "take decisive measures" in response.

stories.headline: Top Democrats press Maine Senate candidate to drop out of race over sexual assault allegation
stories.summary: Graham Platner denied the allegation, calling it "categorically false" but said he was "taking the time to reflect on the best path forward".

stories.headline: US launches fresh strikes on Iran after ships attacked in Strait of Hormuz
stories.summary: Bahrain and Kuwait sounded missile alert sirens Wednesday morning after Iran immediately warned Washington it would 'take whatever measures it deems necessary' following the US strikes.

stories.headline: Will Le Pen rise again? French nationalist leader defiant after court's ruling

stories.headline: US launches new wave of Iran strikes after attacks on tankers

stories.headline: US Strikes Iran and Blocks Oil Sales
stories.summary: The US launched airstrikes in Iran and revoked a waiver that allowed it to sell oil globally, further imperiling a peace agreement after a series of attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Nick Wadhams breaks down the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: These Maine Democrats Might Replace Graham Platner in the Senate Race
stories.summary: Mr. Platner has not yet withdrawn from the race after a rape allegation, but Democrats in the state and nationally are already exploring potential alternatives.

stories.summary: The US carried out a new round of strikes in Iran targeting more than 80 sites and revoked a waiver allowing new sales of its oil, further imperiling a peace agreement after a series of attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.summary: Foundation Healthcare Holdings Ltd opened unchanged from its initial public offering price on Wednesday in Singapore after a listing that was the largest of the year so far in the city state outside real estate investment trusts.

stories.summary: The EU accelerated home renovations after the pandemic, but according to its own auditors, it still lacks convincing evidence that the program delivered the energy savings and value for taxpayers that justified its massive investment.

stories.summary: The European Central Bank has given the eurozone's largest lenders until the end of October to explain how they will strengthen their cyber defences against increasingly capable AI systems.
